creator: tz@freebsd.org
text:
make fetch fails:

===========================================================================
=======================<phase: fetch          >============================
===>  License GPLv3 LGPL3 accepted by the user
===>   codeblocks-devel-18.04 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - found
===>   codeblocks-devel-18.04 depends on executable: svn - found
=> codeblocks-18.04-11386.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist in /portdistfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch http://download.tuxfamily.org/bartcoding/FreeBSD/codeblocks-18.04-11386.tar.gz
fetch: http://download.tuxfamily.org/bartcoding/FreeBSD/codeblocks-18.04-11386.tar.gz: Not Found
[..]

That is no surprise since there is only 17.x available:
http://download.tuxfamily.org/bartcoding/FreeBSD/

Please check the download destination. If the new version was removed, you should close the PR.

Greetings,
Torsten
